_comment: Claude Beacon configuration. Edit and save; changes apply to the next notification (no rebuild needed).

timeouts._comment: Seconds before a notification auto-dismisses when you're away. 0 = never (stays until you focus its terminal or click).

_sound_comment: macOS system sound name (Glass, Ping, Hero, Submarine, Pop, Tink, ...). Empty string = silent.

accent._comment: Hex color of the left accent stripe per kind.

_color_comment: Every *Color field takes a hex like #FFFFFF. Empty string = system default (adapts to light/dark).

buttons._comment: label = the button text. backgroundColor = the button fill. textColor = the label color. Empty backgroundColor = system accent (focus) / default (dismiss).
